subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden and daughter of My handmaiden! Hearken thou unto My call which hath been raised from the precincts of this Most Great Prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز من و فرزند کنیز من بشنو ندایم را که از شطر سجن اعظم مرتفع گشته قسم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement
